about.title: About Me
about.bio1: My name is Iosef Suárez Gil, I'm a Full Stack web developer and graduate of 6th grade Computer Science. I specialize in building modern web applications using React, Node.js, Express and MongoDB.
about.bio2: Since I started programming, I've been passionate about solving problems and building digital experiences that make a difference. Every project is an opportunity to learn something new and push my own limits.
about.bio3: I'm constantly learning, exploring new technologies and looking for challenges that help me grow as a developer. My goal is to deliver real, quality solutions to every project I work on.

timeline.title: Centro Educativo Técnico Laboral Kinal
timeline.desc: From 1st grade to 6th grade Computer Science. Technical training in programming, networking and software development.

timeline.title: Colegio Bentham
timeline.desc: 1st and 2nd grade elementary. Start of my academic education.

items.title: Client-admin
items.desc: Complete admin panel for managing sports fields, reservations, tournaments and teams. Includes React + Tailwind frontend and Node.js + .NET backend.

items.title: client-user
items.desc: React Native (Expo) mobile app for Kinal Sport users, with authentication, navigation, and integrated backend services.

items.title: GestorDeOpiniones
items.desc: REST API for managing publications and comments with JWT authentication, Cloudinary file uploads and MongoDB database.

items.title: frontDivisas
items.desc: Minimal currency converter built with React and Vite, consuming an external exchange rate API.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.desc: Personal portfolio built with React, Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion, with responsive design, dark mode and bilingual support.
